title: デビュー戦の後に・今より幕は開かれて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a triumphant debut race, Air Groove returns
amidst resounding cheers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I hope you're not getting lax.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing but the beginning. I expect you to
do your best tomorrow and onward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We leave Sapporo Racecourse and head to the
airport to return to Tokyo.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There's something that I forgot to do. Stay here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious what Air Groove is up to, so I watch
her from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! Congratulations on your debut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I wanted to tell you in person.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Your support is what allowed me to
give it my all today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're so... regal... when you run. So confident...
You were amazing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you nervous with all that attention on
you even before you started running?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was. However, I transform the weight of that
attention into responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Responsibility?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The responsibility to run in a manner
befitting a reigning empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I embrace my anxieties and transform them into
strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Anxieties... into strength...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've only just made my debut. There's still a long
road to travel before I reach the ideals I strive
for.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Set your sights on your own debut and do your
best. I'm rooting for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Right! I will! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't recall asking you to follow me. In fact, I
think I told you to stay put.
choice_data_list: I guess curiosity got the best of me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No matter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully you understand the weight that I bear
now.
choice_data_list: The weight of always being watched?
The weight of always being watched?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed. It will only grow from here on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This encumbrance falls not only upon me, as
you'll find out soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This bears repeating—don't get lax. And...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Stay with me, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I offer a reassuring nod. Our journey's only just
begun!
